descriptionShort: Article about Orland Kurtenbach's return to coaching with the Richmond Sockeyes in the BCJHL.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach, the former NHL Canucks player and coach, has returned to hockey coaching as head coach of the Richmond Sockeyes in the British Columbia Junior Hockey League. The 50-year-old balances his regular job with coaching the Tier Two junior team, working days from 8 a.m. until midnight. Kurtenbach emphasizes that coaching is a hobby and he has no intention of returning to full-time coaching in professional hockey.

attribution.headline: Orland Kurtenbach Returns to Coaching with Richmond Sockeyes
